series_metadata.series_title: Bond Issues and Applications for Elections
series_metadata.series_description: Applications for authority to issue bonds or submit bond issue to a vote.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain documents pertaining to the bond issue or any renewals thereof for the life of the bond or renewal. Upon expiration of the bond or renewal, applicable documents are to be purged and destroyed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain documents pertaining to the bond issue or any renewals thereof for the life of the bond or renewal. Upon expiration of the bond or renewal, applicable documents are to be purged and deleted., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
